raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Remove contaminated clothing and sleeve immediately.
STEP 2: Wash skin with plenty of soap and water for 15-20 minutes.
STEP 3: Flush eyes if any splash occurred.

DO NOT: Use harsh scrubbing brushes or solvents on the skin.

ESCALATE: Seek medical attention if irritation persists or if the chemical was absorbed through the skin. Provide the product label/SDS to the doctor.

immediate_steps: Remove contaminated clothing and sleeve immediately.
Wash skin with plenty of soap and water for 15-20 minutes.
Flush eyes if any splash occurred.
do_not_do: Use harsh scrubbing brushes or solvents on the skin.
escalate_when: Seek medical attention if irritation persists or if the chemical was absorbed through the skin. Provide the product label/SDS to the doctor.
